name: @elvis1513/auto-coding-skill
description: CLI installer for auto-coding-skill (Claude Code + Codex CLI) with Go fullstack + Jenkins workflow support.

scripts.test: node -c cli/src/index.js && python3 -m py_compile src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/ap.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/core.py src/auto-coding-skill/scripts/http_checks.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/ap.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/core.py cli/assets/skill/scripts/http_checks.py && find src cli -type d -name '__pycache__' -prune -exec rm -rf {} +
scripts.release:check: npm run sync-assets && npm run test && npm pack --dry-run
